goal: Download protein structure 1A2B from PDB, analyze its binding sites, and create a 3D visualization showing active sites and secondary structure

assertions.description: User received information about protein 1A2B function and properties
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Workflow output contains protein description, molecular weight, and biological function

assertions.description: User received 3D visualization of the protein structure
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Generated image/plot file shows protein backbone and secondary structures

assertions.description: User was informed about identified binding sites and their coordinates
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Output includes specific amino acid residues and spatial coordinates of active sites

assertions.description: Results were presented in an understandable format for research use
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Final summary is structured with clear sections and scientific terminology

assertions.description: Browser MCP was used to access PDB database before downloading
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Browser MCP tool called with PDB URL (rcsb.org) in conversation history

assertions.description: File download was completed successfully via Browser MCP
assertions.evaluation_criteria: download_file() tool executed and PDB file saved to workspace

assertions.description: Python script execution for structure analysis occurred
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Shell MCP or R Script MCP executed code containing structure parsing libraries
Workflow included file format verification or structure integrity checks

assertions.description: Proper error handling for missing or invalid data
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Agents handled potential failures (network issues, file corruption) gracefully
